source_material.title: Novice snack concept dry run
source_material.body: A novice user wants a dry run for a snack concept survey. The intent is to preview likely reactions, not estimate population prevalence. The target audience is busy office workers. Use a small synthetic panel and warn that human fieldwork is still required.

expected_research_intake.research_context: Plain-language dry run for a first concept survey.
expected_research_intake.target_population_summary: Busy office workers considering a snack purchase.
unresolved_gaps: Segmentation was not specified by the novice user.

objectives: Preview likely reactions to the concept.
decision_questions: Should the concept move to human fieldwork?
chart_plan: Suppress open-text raw charts and use evidence instead.

expected_question_rationales.rationale: Measures topline concept appeal in a simple way for a novice user.
Captures the main reason behind the reaction in the respondent's own words.

expected_segmentation_behavior.minimum_base_rule: No subgroup reporting without explicit segments.

expected_report_warnings: Do not treat the synthetic panel as representative of the target population.
expected_human_fieldwork_handoff: Use the dry run to improve wording before real fieldwork.
Human fieldwork is still required to understand real prevalence and segment sizes.
